phrases.text_local: Como chego às Salinas de Tavira?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo SHEH-goo UHUHSH suh-LEE-nuhsh DIH tuh-VEE-ruh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para as Salinas de Tavira.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH suh-LEE-nuhsh DIH tuh-VEE-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Tavira Salt Pans.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Tavira Salt Pans.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH suh-LEE-nuhsh DIH tuh-VEE-ruh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para as Salinas de Tavira.

phrases.text_local: Com licença, onde fica a igreja?
phrases.pronunciation: KOHM lee-SAYNG-suh, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH eeg-REH-zhuh?
phrases.cultural_note: The church is a key reference point; mentioning nearby commercial landmarks aids quick navigation.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Igreja de Nossa Senhora da Graça.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH eeg-REH-zhuh DIH NAW-suh seh-NYOH-ruh DUH GRAH-suh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Church of Nossa Senhora da Graça.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Church of Nossa Senhora da Graça.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH eeg-REH-zhuh DIH NAW-suh seh-NYOH-ruh DUH GRAH-suh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Igreja de Nossa Senhora da Graça.

phrases.text_local: Sabe onde fica a igreja, por favor?
phrases.pronunciation: SAH-bee ON-jee FEE-kah ah ee-GRAY-zhah, por fah-VOR?
phrases.cultural_note: Igreja de Nossa Senhora da Graça is a historic church on the island.

likely_response.local: Sim, a igreja fica no largo da matriz.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEEN, AH eeg-REH-zhuh FEE-kuh NOO LAH-ruh-goo DUH muht-REESH.
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, the church is in the main square.

responses.english: Yes, the church is in the main square.
responses.phonetic: SEEN, AH eeg-REH-zhuh FEE-kuh NOO LAH-ruh-goo DUH muht-REESH.
responses.local: Sim, a igreja fica no largo da matriz.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ferry kiosk is
phrases.text_local: Onde compro o bilhete para a ilha?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-deh KOM-proo oo bi-LYEH-tee PAH-rah ah EE-lyah (liaison: para-a → PAH-rah-ah | a-ilha → ah-EE-lyah)
phrases.cultural_note: Tickets are sold at a designated kiosk near the departure point; cash is commonly used.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, o quiosque fica junto ao cais.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, AW KEEOHSH-kih FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too OW KEYESH.
likely_response.translation_en: Good day, the kiosk is right by the pier.

responses.english: Good day, the kiosk is right by the pier.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, AW KEEOHSH-kih FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too OW KEYESH.
responses.local: Bom dia, o quiosque fica junto ao cais.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a igreja na Ilha de Tavira?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH eeg-REH-zhuh NUH EE-lyuh DIH tuh-VEE-ruh?
phrases.cultural_note: The church serves as a central landmark; visitors usually walk from the ferry dock to reach it.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Igreja de Nossa Senhora da Graça.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH eeg-REH-zhuh DIH NAW-suh seh-NYOH-ruh DUH GRAH-suh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Church of Nossa Senhora da Graça.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Church of Nossa Senhora da Graça.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH eeg-REH-zhuh DIH NAW-suh seh-NYOH-ruh DUH GRAH-suh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a Igreja de Nossa Senhora da Graça.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the salt pans are
phrases.cultural_note: Salinas de Tavira are salt pans on the mainland, reachable from the island.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para as Salinas de Tavira.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH suh-LEE-nuhsh DIH tuh-VEE-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Salinas de Tavira.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Salinas de Tavira.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH suh-LEE-nuhsh DIH tuh-VEE-ruh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para as Salinas de Tavira.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar as Salinas de Tavira?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR UHSH suh-LEE-nuhsh DIH tuh-VEE-ruh?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para as Salinas de Tavira localizadas na zona nascente da ilha.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH suh-LEE-nuhsh DIH tuh-VEE-ruh loo-kuh-lee-ZAH-duhsh NUH ZOH-nuh nuh-SAYNG-tih DUH EE-lyuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Salinas de Tavira located in the eastern part of the island.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Salinas de Tavira located in the eastern part of the island.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH suh-LEE-nuhsh DIH tuh-VEE-ruh loo-kuh-lee-ZAH-duhsh NUH ZOH-nuh nuh-SAYNG-tih DUH EE-lyuh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para as Salinas de Tavira localizadas na zona nascente da ilha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the umbrella rental is
phrases.text_local: Onde alugo um guarda-sol na praia?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih uh-LOO-goo OONNG GWAH-ruh-duh-SAWL NUH PREYEUH?
phrases.cultural_note: Rental kiosks are typically positioned near the main beach access points for convenience.

likely_response.local: Pode alugar nos quiosques de aluguer na praia.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih uh-loo-GAHR NOOSH KEEOHSH-kihsh DIH uh-loo-GEHR NUH PREYEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: You can rent at the rental kiosks on the beach.

responses.english: You can rent at the rental kiosks on the beach.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih uh-loo-GAHR NOOSH KEEOHSH-kihsh DIH uh-loo-GEHR NUH PREYEUH.
responses.local: Pode alugar nos quiosques de aluguer na praia.

phrases.text_local: Como chego ao farol da ilha?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moo SHEH-goo OW fuh-RAWL DUH EE-lyuh?
phrases.cultural_note: The lighthouse marks the eastern tip; walking along the shoreline is the standard route.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Farol da Ilha de Tavira.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW fuh-RAWL DUH EE-lyuh DIH tuh-VEE-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Tavira Island Lighthouse.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Tavira Island Lighthouse.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW fuh-RAWL DUH EE-lyuh DIH tuh-VEE-ruh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Farol da Ilha de Tavira.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ferry kiosk is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o quiosque de bilhetes do ferry?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW KEEOHSH-kih DIH bee-LYEH-tihsh DOO FEH-ree?
phrases.cultural_note: The ferry ticket kiosk is located at Cais da Ilha de Tavira.

likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, kiosk at the pier.

responses.english: Good morning, kiosk at the pier.

phrases.cultural_note: The lighthouse, Farol da Ilha de Tavira, is a key landmark on the island.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Farol da Ilha de Tavira.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW fuh-RAWL DUH EE-lyuh DIH tuh-VEE-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Tavira Island Lighthouse.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Tavira Island Lighthouse.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW fuh-RAWL DUH EE-lyuh DIH tuh-VEE-ruh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Farol da Ilha de Tavira.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso alugar um toldo de praia?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo uh-loo-GAHR OONNG TAWL-doo DIH PREYEUH?

likely_response.local: Procure os quiosques de aluguer de toldos na praia.
likely_response.pronunciation: proo-KOO-rih OOSH KEEOHSH-kihsh DIH uh-loo-GEHR DIH TOHL-doosh NUH PREYEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Look for the umbrella rental kiosks on the beach.

responses.english: Look for the umbrella rental kiosks on the beach.
responses.phonetic: proo-KOO-rih OOSH KEEOHSH-kihsh DIH uh-loo-GEHR DIH TOHL-doosh NUH PREYEUH.
responses.local: Procure os quiosques de aluguer de toldos na praia.
